title: juncus fauriensis subsp. fauriensis
intro: Juncus fauriensis subsp. fauriensis is a subspecies of the Juncus fauriensis plant, a type of rush that belongs to the family Juncaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Juncus fauriensis subsp. fauriensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, treat respiratory issues, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant in decoctions, tinctures, and salves for topical applications.
